commands.review_summary:
This PR rewrites `skills/autoreview/SKILL.md` examples to set `AUTOREVIEW` and `AUTOREVIEW_HARNESS` once while removing personal local helper path references.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main source inspection shows the two reported personal helper paths, and the repository tree shows the generic checkout helper path that the PR should preserve.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] An automated repair can update this one docs file to preserve the generic checkout path while keeping the private path removed.

target.title: fix(autoreview): simplify helper paths in SKILL.md
target.body:
## Summary

This PR cleans up `skills/autoreview/SKILL.md` by removing the hardcoded helper path and simplifying how the autoreview scripts are referenced.

## Why

The SKILL.md repeated helper paths in multiple places. Setting them once makes it easier and safer for agents to use the correct autoreview command consistently.

Also, there was a personal local path in the SKILL.md (closes https://github.com/openclaw/agent-skills/issues/12):

```bash
/Users/steipete/Projects/agent-scripts/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview
```

## What Changed

- Added a simple `## Skill Path (Bash)` section
- Sets `AUTOREVIEW` and `AUTOREVIEW_HARNESS` once to use those variables throughout the bash examples
- Keeps project-local and global skill setups clear
- Simplifies the `## Helper` section so it reuses the variables instead of repeating paths
- Removes personal path examples
target.author: maximilianzuern
